agentSupport.notes: Crash-safe merge boundary and race-free reconciliation for the APS loop: the LAND checkpoint (3) is a fenced sequence (write LANDING token, merge, write MERGED, set Merged-not-Complete per ADR-0013, then cleanup) with resume disambiguation via target-branch merge SHA so an interrupted landing never re-merges; parallel waves use single-writer reconciliation (workers append status-events to an atomic queue, one conductor drains serially) and actual-file wave locks (post-BUILD git diff, not declared Files) with a barrier wave gate. Design changes #4 and #5 / gap G6 (LOOP-007).
